creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
On 2013-12-30 11:33, William Grzybowski wrote:
> Can you please provide a patch using diff -u or svn patch?

I saw that I forgot to include pkg-plist changes, which are limited to 
the soname of libexiv2 :

--- exiv2.orig/pkg-plist	2013-10-19 02:27:47.000000000 +0200
+++ exiv2/pkg-plist	2013-12-30 21:50:35.708606971 +0100
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@
  lib/libexiv2.a
  lib/libexiv2.la
  lib/libexiv2.so
-lib/libexiv2.so.12
+lib/libexiv2.so.13
  libdata/pkgconfig/exiv2.pc
  man/man1/exiv2.1.gz
  share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/exiv2.mo
